description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a deep brown fabric upholstery. The seat features two large, uniform cushions, while the backrest is slightly curved and adorned with subtle button tufting for added visual interest. The armrests are gently flared and rise to the same height as the backrest, providing a cohesive silhouette. The sofa stands on four outward-angled, light wood legs that contrast with the dark upholstery and add a touch of Scandinavian style. The overall form is compact and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The surface appears soft and matte, with a smooth finish and no visible patterns aside from the tufting.
description: A compact, modern brown sofa with button-tufted backrest, flared armrests, and light wood angled legs. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with a minimalist, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, two seat cushions, button-tufted backrest, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the outward angle of the front and rear legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, slightly curved backrest and the clean, uninterrupted upholstery on the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest profile and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and a single continuous back cushion with button tufting; all cushions appear attached and evenly arranged.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, gently flared armrests that are the same height as the backrest, with a straight profile and subtle padding, integrated into the sofa's frame.
attribute_leg_design: Four outward-angled legs, positioned at each corner, made of light wood with a simple, slightly tapered design and exposed finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a slight curve and button tufting, providing a unified and supportive structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle button tufting on the backrest; no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
